stocks.impact_theory: DOJ legal opinion suggests Defense Production Act can override California state laws blocking Sable's pipeline restart amid Iran tensions boosting oil needs. Economic: Increases CA oil production by 10-20%, reduces imports. Market psych: Short squeeze with high interest, momentum trading. Historical: Similar to 2022 energy crisis rallies. Analogies: Like a dam breaking for pent-up supply; federal trump card in state-federal battles.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts hyped DOJ memo, +37% surge with volume spike; web news confirms legal boost. Sentiment shift from stalled project to greenlight potential.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +25% gains on pipeline approval momentum.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Legal delays, oil price drop from de-escalation, regulatory reversal.

stocks.justification: Strong X buzz, volume confirmation, timely geopolitical tie-in.
